headline: How Union Pacific’s Big Boy 4014 Coast-to-Coast Tour At Union Pacific (UNP) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: Union Pacific’s legendary Big Boy No. 4014 steam locomotive has already embarked on its first coast-to-coast tour, celebrating America’s 250th anniversary with a multi-state journey from Sacramento to New York and a finale in Cheyenne. The tour’s 14-state route, including a two-day Fourth of July stop in Philadelphia, turns a heritage asset into a powerful brand and public engagement campaign for Union Pacific. Next, we’ll explore how using the Big Boy tour as a nationwide brand showcase...
